# Support

Use this repository for documentation and standards questions related to:

- Core ERP documentation;
- project documentation;
- standards and runbooks;
- integrations;
- metadata and indexes;
- agents execution reports.

For implementation bugs in a Web, API, Docker, or database repository, open the
issue in the owning repository listed in:

```text
Docs/03_standards/operations/git-repository-map.md
```
